footer.disclaimer: This site is not affiliated with Nintendo, The Pokémon Company, Bandai, or any related trademark holders. Card images are copyright of their respective owners and are provided for collection reference only.

home.tagline: Search, collect, and organize your trading cards. Build your own binders and track your collection anytime.
home.supports: Supports Pokémon TCG · One Piece TCG · Traditional Chinese / Japanese / English
home.statsLabel: All series synced in real time
home.statsCoverage: Covering Pokémon TCG and One Piece TCG, continuously updated in Traditional Chinese, Japanese, and English
home.carouselHint: Click a card to view details
home.featuresSubtitle: Every card collection tool you need, all in one place

search.title: Search Cards
search.description: Multilingual card search for PTCG and OPCG — quickly find target cards by series and rarity.

binder.title: Build Binders
binder.description: Customize formats and covers to organize your collection into beautiful virtual binders, with drag-and-drop sorting.

collection.title: Manage Collection
collection.description: Mark cards as owned or wanted, track collection progress for each series, with support for various binder sizes.

sync.title: Device Sync
sync.description: Your account data syncs to the cloud, so you can organize your collection on any device, anytime.

share.title: Share Your Binders
share.description: Create a binder link and easily share your collection with friends. (Coming soon)

more.title: More Features
more.description: Under active development — stay tuned for more useful features.

home.aboutBody: TCG Binder is developed solo by me, aiming to build the most intuitive and easy-to-use collection management tool for card players. If you have any suggestions or questions, feel free to reach out through the channels below.

auth.passwordMismatch: The two passwords do not match
auth.weakPassword: Password must be at least {min} characters

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your TCG Binder account to use all binder features
login.passwordResetAlert: Your password has been reset. Please log in with your new password.
login.accountDeletedAlert: Your account has been deleted. Thank you for using our service.
login.genericOauthError: An error occurred during sign in. Please try again.

oauthErrors.OAuthAccountNotLinked: This email already has an account but isn't linked to this social login. Please sign in with your original method, then link the social account in Settings.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Fill in your details to create a TCG Binder account

errors.EMAIL_TAKEN: This email is already in use
errors.SERVER_ERROR: Server error, please try again later

modal.title: Log in to continue
modal.failed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email, and if an account exists you'll receive a password reset link
forgot.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please try again later.
forgot.successAlert: If an account exists for this email, you'll receive a reset email within a few minutes. Please also check your spam folder.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.subtitle: Enter your new password. This link is valid for 15 minutes.
reset.invalidLink: Invalid link. Please request a new one.
reset.tokenExpired: This link has expired. Please request a new one.
reset.tokenInvalid: This link is invalid or has already been used. Please request a new one.
reset.genericError: An error occurred. Please try again later.

metadata.title: TCG Binder
metadata.description: Online TCG card collection manager — search cards, mark owned/wanted, and organize them into custom binders.

oauth.subtitle: Once linked, you can log in with the corresponding social account

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.subtitle: Deleting your account will permanently erase all data and cannot be undone
dangerZone.confirmDescription: This cannot be undone. Your account, collected cards, and binders will be permanently deleted. Type "DELETE" below to confirm.
